channel.title: Device-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Device-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Headwind MDM vs MicroMDM vs GLPI: Best Self-Hosted MDM Solutions 2026
item.description: Mobile Device Management (MDM) is the backbone of any organization that needs to control, secure, and monitor smartphones, tablets, and other mobile endpoints. Commercial MDM platforms like Jamf Pro, Microsoft Intune, and VMware Workspace ONE carry steep per-device licensing fees and send your telemetry to third-party clouds. Self-hosted MDM solutions give you full control over device data, enforce compliance policies on your own infrastructure, and eliminate recurring subscription costs.
